report.title: 90-Day Execution Pack: Governance-as-Code (GaC) & CI/CD Compliance Pipelines
report.abstract: This report establishes the technical framework for 'Governance-as-Code' (GaC). It specifies the integration of GitHub Actions-based compliance gates, PR annotations, OPA/Rego policy enforcement, and JSON schemas for control mapping to ensure regulator-defensible audit trails for AGI workloads.
report.content:
# 1. Governance-as-Code (GaC) Integration
## 1.1 GitHub Actions Compliance Gates Compliance is shifted-left directly into the developer workflow. Every PR triggering an AGI-related change must pass the **Sentinel Compliance Gate**.
### GitHub Actions Workflow Fragment ```yaml name: AGI Governance Verification on: [pull_request] jobs: governance-gate: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout Code uses: actions/checkout@v4 - name: Run Sentinel Verify run: sentinel verify --policy policies/eu-ai-act.rego --data src/model_config.json - name: Annotate PR if: failure() uses: sentinel/pr-annotator@v1 with: message: "EU AI Act Violation: Annex IV (Technical Documentation) missing for High-Risk system." ```
---
# 2. OPA/Rego Policy Framework
## 2.1 EU AI Act Policy Integration Policies are codified in **Rego** to enable deterministic, machine-readable enforcement. - **Redline Check**: Deny deployment if training FLOPs > $10^{26}$ without explicit Board (SVD-0) approval. - **PII Protection**: Ensure all RAG retrievers include the `PIIScrubbing` middleware.
### Example: Rego Policy Snippet ```rego package sentinel.agi.safety
default allow = false
# Deny if reasoning depth > 10 steps (Recursive Protection) deny[msg] { input.reasoning_depth > 10 msg = "Recursive Depth Limit Exceeded (SEV-1)" }
# Allow if mTLS and SPIFFE ID present allow { input.transport == "gRPC" input.identity.type == "spiffe" not deny } ```
---
# 3. Control Mapping & JSON Schemas
## 3.1 Control Mapping Pack (CMP) The CMP provides a one-to-one mapping between technical logs and regulatory requirements. - **GDPR Mapping**: `event.user_id` -> `data_privacy_control_01`. - **ISO 42001 Mapping**: `audit.model_hash` -> `Control A.7.2 (Lifecycle)`.
## 3.2 Predictive Compliance Risk Modeling Sentinel v2.4 includes a "Risk Forecaster" that analyzes PR trends to predict future compliance breaches. - **Trend Reporting**: Dashboards visualizing "Alignment Velocity" and "Policy Drift" over the 90-day rollout. - **PR Annotations**: Proactive warnings on PRs that introduce "Reasoning Latency" or "Context Fragmentation."
